issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for Bolt.new usage.
The skill lacks concrete, runnable procedures or code snippets for the agent to execute.

scenarios.name: task-management-kanban
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a complete, runnable codebase with frontend, backend, SQLite, Kanban board, drag‑and‑drop, authentication, and mobile responsiveness, whereas Response B merely offers a prompt without any actual implementation.

scenarios.name: url-shortener-analytics
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully covers all rubric items with detailed code, while Response B omits a dashboard and uses the wrong rate‑limit window.
